== Notes for [[Item:Q105424|Q105424]] ==

* [https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Matthew+1&version=KJV Matthew 1:13.]

Wikipedia: [http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Matthew_1:13 Matthew 1:13.]

The ''Gospel of Matthew'' says he was son of Abiud, but a generation is missing. Hugh Schonfeld has identified the missing generation from a surviving Hebrew text of the gospel. The name Abner, he says, should be inserted between Abiud and Eliakim. See comment under https://www.geni.com/people/Abner/6000000015019706772

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000015019730536

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]]
[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]][[Category:Pages]]
